base.immortal_locked: You are a being of pure divinity. The mortal realm holds nothing for you.
base.establishment_closed: This establishment has been CLOSED by royal decree!
base.establishment_closed_by: By order of {0} {1}, this location is off-limits.
base.deposed: You have been DEPOSED! You are no longer the monarch!
base.whisper_uneasy: You notice a few NPCs exchange uneasy glances as you arrive.
base.whisper_approving: You notice a few NPCs nod approvingly as you walk past.
base.whisper_neutral: You notice a few NPCs whispering among themselves as you enter.
base.guard_messenger: A messenger rushes to find you with dire news!
base.guard_honor_bound: As a Royal Guard, you are honor-bound to defend the crown!
base.guard_rush_question: Will you rush to the castle to aid in the defense?
base.guard_rush_castle: You rush toward the castle, sword drawn!
base.guard_loyalty_unquestioned: Your loyalty to the crown shall not be questioned!
base.guard_turn_away: You turn away from your duty...
base.guard_crown_remembers: The crown will remember this betrayal.
base.guard_stripped: *** You have been STRIPPED of your Royal Guard status! ***
base.level_up: *** LEVEL UP! You are now Level {0}! ***
base.training_points_hint: You earned training points! Visit the Level Master to spend them.
base.world_boss_rampaging: *** {0} is rampaging across the realm! Type /boss to join the fight! ***
base.poison_damage_turns: The poison courses through your veins! (-{0} HP, {1} turns left)
base.poison_damage: The poison courses through your veins! (-{0} HP)
base.poison_death: The poison has claimed your life!
base.poison_cleared: The poison has finally left your system!
base.shout_evil_curse: mutters a curse under their breath
base.shout_evil_spit: spits on the ground as you pass
base.shout_evil_dagger: sharpens a dagger while watching you
base.shout_good_news: shares news of their latest adventures
base.shout_class_blade: tests the edge of a blade
base.activity_inn_drink: nursing a drink at the bar
base.activity_inn_corner: sitting alone at a corner table
base.activity_church_candle: lighting a candle at the altar
base.activity_church_priest: speaking with one of the priests
base.activity_weapon_blade: examining a blade on the wall
base.activity_weapon_mace: testing the weight of a mace
base.activity_armor_gauntlets: trying on a pair of gauntlets
base.activity_street_lean: leaning against a wall, watching passers-by
base.activity_alley_watch: keeping a watchful eye on the alley
base.activity_castle_guard: standing guard near the throne room
base.antidote_used: You drink an antidote — the poison drains from your body!
base.no_antidotes: You don't have any antidotes. Buy them from dungeon merchants or the healer.
base.online_only_mail: Mail is only available in online mode.
base.online_only_trade: Trading is only available in online mode.
base.online_only_bounties: Bounties are only available in online mode.
base.online_only_auction: The Auction House is only available in online mode.
base.online_only_boss: World Boss is only available in online mode.
base.compact_enabled: Compact Mode ENABLED - menus optimized for mobile/small screens.
base.compact_disabled: Compact Mode DISABLED - full-size menus restored.
base.type_help: Type /help or just / for a list of commands.
base.help_commands_work: These commands work from any location:
base.help_gear: - Show detailed equipment and bonuses (yours or team)
base.help_herb: - Use an herb from your pouch
base.help_say: - Chat to players at your location
base.no_active_quests: No active quests. Visit the Castle or talk to NPCs to find quests.
base.materials_hint1: Rare materials can be found in the dungeon depths.
base.materials_hint2: Defeat monsters, open treasure chests, and challenge Old Gods
base.materials_hint3: to collect materials needed for powerful enchantments.
base.can_rest: You can rest for the night.
base.no_healing_potions: You don't have any healing potions.
base.visit_healer: Visit the Healer to buy some.
base.potion_healed: You drink a healing potion and recover {0} HP!
base.continue_on_way: After the encounter, you continue on your way...
base.ambush_faction_found: A member of {0} has found you!
base.ambush_escaped: You manage to escape into the crowd!
base.ambush_blocked: You couldn't escape! They block your path!
base.ambush_disengaged: You managed to disengage from combat!
base.pref_intimate_fade: Intimate scenes will now 'fade to black'
base.pref_intimate_full: Intimate scenes will now show full content
base.pref_sr_enabled_desc: Menus will use simplified plain text format.
base.pref_sr_disabled_desc: Menus will use visual ASCII art format.
base.pref_telemetry_disabled_desc: We will no longer collect anonymous gameplay statistics.
base.pref_telemetry_enabled_desc: Thank you for helping us improve the game!
base.pref_font_update: Font will update in the terminal momentarily.
base.pref_autolevel_enabled_desc: You will level up automatically when you have enough XP.
base.pref_autolevel_disabled_desc: Visit the Level Master to level up manually.
base.pref_compact_enabled_desc: Menus will use compact layout for mobile/small screens.
base.pref_compact_enabled_keys: Use number keys to navigate menus.
base.pref_autoequip_disabled_desc: Shop purchases will go straight to inventory.
base.pref_autoequip_enabled_desc: You'll be prompted to equip or inventory on purchase.
base.no_one_to_talk: There's no one here to talk to.
base.who_talk_to: Who would you like to talk to?
base.decide_not_talk: You decide not to talk to anyone.
base.ask_rumors_to: You ask {0} if they've heard any interesting rumors...
base.rumor_seals: They say seven ancient seals lie hidden in the dungeon depths...
base.rumor_old_gods: The old gods stir in their prisons. Dark times are coming.
base.rumor_stranger: A mysterious stranger has been seen around town. Trust no one.
base.rumor_king: The king grows paranoid. He sees enemies everywhere.
base.rumor_creature: Deep in the dungeon, there's a creature that guards untold riches.
base.rumor_lower_levels: Some adventurers never return from the lower levels. Choose your depth wisely.
base.rumor_dark_alley: I've heard whispers of a hidden shop in the Dark Alley...
base.rumor_temple: The temple priests know more than they let on about the old gods.
base.rumor_castle: There's talk of a secret passage in the castle. But I've said too much.
base.rumor_wave: A wave returns to the ocean... whatever that means. Cryptic nonsense if you ask me.
base.rumor_manwe: They say Manwe himself cursed these dungeons. But that's just a story... right?
base.rumor_healers: The healers can cure almost anything, for a price.
base.rumor_team: Team up with others if you want to survive the deeper levels.
base.rumor_veloura: I've heard there's a way to save Veloura... if you have the courage to try.
base.rumor_npc_items: Some NPCs carry powerful items. Defeat them in a duel and claim their gear!
base.attack_teammate: You can't attack your own teammate!
base.attack_dangerous: {0} is level {1}. This looks extremely dangerous.
base.attack_lunge: You draw your weapon and lunge at {0}!
base.attack_looted: You loot {result.GoldGained:N0} gold from their body.
base.buff_tricksters_luck: - Trickster's Luck: {0}% chance per attack for bonus damage, dodge, or stamina
base.stat_no_faction: You have not pledged allegiance to any faction.
base.stat_faction_hint: Visit the Castle, Temple, or Dark Alley to learn more.
base.god_have_artifact: {0}: You have the artifact. Return to their floor.
base.god_seek_artifact: {0}: Seek the artifact deeper in the dungeon.
base.gear_inspect_who: Whose gear do you want to inspect?
